dashboard.label: Sessions
dashboard.description: Privileged Session Monitoring — Connect, Duration, Data Transfer, Disconnect

search.query: `asger_sessions` event_type="*connected*" outcome="success" protocol=$protocol_filter$ session_origin=$origin_filter$ | stats dc(session_id)

`asger_sessions` event_type="*disconnect*" session_duration>0 protocol=$protocol_filter$ session_origin=$origin_filter$ | eval dur_min=round(session_duration/60,1) | stats avg(dur_min) as avg | eval avg=round(avg,1)
`asger_sessions` event_type="*connected*" protocol=$protocol_filter$ session_origin=$origin_filter$ | timechart span=1h count by protocol
`asger_sessions` event_type="*connected*" outcome="success" session_origin=* | stats count by session_origin

`asger_sessions` event_type="*disconnect*" session_duration>0 protocol=$protocol_filter$ session_origin=$origin_filter$ | eval dur_bucket=case(session_duration<60,"<1 min",session_duration<300,"1-5 min",session_duration<900,"5-15 min",session_duration<1800,"15-30 min",session_duration<3600,"30-60 min",1==1,"60+ min") | stats count by dur_bucket

chart.title: Top 10 Users by Total Session Time

search.query: `asger_sessions` event_type="*disconnect*" session_duration>0 protocol=$protocol_filter$ session_origin=$origin_filter$ | eval dur_hr=round(session_duration/3600,2) | stats sum(dur_hr) as total_hr, count as sessions by user | sort -total_hr | head 10

`asger_sessions` event_type="*disconnect*" (bytes_in>0 OR bytes_out>0) protocol=$protocol_filter$ | eval mb_in=round(bytes_in/1048576,2), mb_out=round(bytes_out/1048576,2) | stats sum(mb_in) as Upload_MB, sum(mb_out) as Download_MB by user | sort -(Upload_MB+Download_MB) | head 10
`asger_sessions` event_type="*connected*" outcome="success" protocol=$protocol_filter$ | stats count by user, target_host | sort -count | head 20

`asger_sessions` event_type="*disconnect*" protocol=$protocol_filter$ session_origin=$origin_filter$ | eval duration_display=if(duration>3600, tostring(round(session_duration/3600,1))." hr", if(duration>60, tostring(round(session_duration/60,1))." min", tostring(round(duration,0))." sec")), data_transfer=tostring(round((bytes_in+bytes_out)/1048576,2))." MB" | table _time, user, target_host, protocol, session_origin, duration_display, data_transfer, messages_in, messages_out, viewer_count, reason | sort -_time

`asger_sessions` protocol=$protocol_filter$ session_origin=$origin_filter$ | table _time, user, privileged_account, target_host, target_hostname, protocol, session_origin, event_type, outcome, device_action, session_id, auth_method | sort -_time
